
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick all objects with white parts and place them on the floor

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: From the current visual perception, I see several objects on the table with some white parts. These include Cup\_45 \(white cup\), Battery\_3 \(white part on battery\), Battery\_30 \(white part on battery\), Lighter\_27 \(white part on lighter\), and possibly others. Hypothesis: These objects have white parts and should be picked. Verification step: I will pick each identified object one by one and then place them on the floor near my current position. Decision and Next action: Start by picking Cup\_45 and placing it on the floor, then proceed with the others in sequence.

I will start with Cup\_45.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Cup_45"
}
```
